mapper.sql: id, title, description, image_url, content, status, sort, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_share_content (title, description, image_url, content, status, sort, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{imageUrl}, #{content}, #{status}, #{sort}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_share_content SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, content = #{content}, status = #{status}, sort = #{sort}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_share_content SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_share_content WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM edu_share_content WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM edu_share_content WHERE deleted = 0
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC
